ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Asian Paints Limited has appointed S R B C & Co. LLP as its new statutory auditors for a five-year term, effective from July 9, 2026. This change is a routine regulatory compliance event, mandated by the completion of the maximum allowable two-term tenure by the previous auditors, Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP. There are no material financial impacts or red flags associated with this transition, as it aligns with standard corporate governance and auditor rotation requirements.
